since_last: 36% of 100 AI names green; Powering AI leads +0.36%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.66% · BTC -0.60% · Gold +0.93% · Nasdaq100 -1.06%. 36% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at +0.36%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at +0.36%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.76%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -12.56%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +7.45%, LEU +3.52%, MU +3.28%, ORCL +2.46%, CSCO +2.25%. Laggards: ISRG -12.56%, PUBM -5.61%, SNAP -5.01%, SPCX -5.00%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.00% at $124.55
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.00% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
